name: Spicy Broccoli Aioli Pizza
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Can Pillsbury Refrigerated All-Ready Pizza Crust
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
TOPPING
1/4 cup Olive oil
4 Garlic cloves, chopped
2 tablespoons Chopped shallots or onion
1 tablespoon Balsamic vinegar
1/3 cup Grated Romano or Parmesan
1/2 teaspoon Dried basil leaves
1/2 teaspoon Dried thyme leaves
1/2 teaspoon Dried oregano leaves
1/4 teaspoon Red pepper flakes
6 ounces Sliced Havarti or Monterey Jack
16 ounces Package Green Giant Frozen Broccoli Cuts, thawed and well drained
7 ounces Jar Roasted red peppers, drained and sliced into 2 x 1/4 inch strips
1/2 cup Grated Parmesan or Romano
1. Heat oven to 425 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a 12-inch pizza pan or 13 x 9-inch pan; sprinkle with cornmeal.
3. Unroll dough; press in bottom and up sides of greased pan to form a rim.
4. Bake for 5 to 8 minutes, or until light golden brown.
5. In food processor bowl with metal blade or blender container, combine oil, garlic, shallots, vinegar, Romano, basil, thyme, oregano and red pepper flakes; process until smooth and set aside.
6. Arrange Havarti over partially baked crust.
7. Place broccoli evenly over cheese.
8. Dollop aioli mixture evenly over top.
9. Arrange pepper strips over broccoli; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake for 17 to 22 minutes, or until edges of crust are deep golden brown. Serve immediately.
